evals.prompt: Evaluate the API responsiveness SLO breaches for the clusterloader2 run. The artifacts have already been downloaded to /tmp/artifacts.
evals.expected_output: The agent should parse APIResponsivenessPrometheus_load_overall.json using jq and output the Perc50, Perc90, Perc99, Count, and SlowCount values with the explicit file path.
assertions: The agent extracts Perc99, Count, and SlowCount
The agent uses jq to parse the JSON
The output includes the explicit file path to the json file

evals.prompt: Investigate the kube-apiserver.log in /tmp/artifacts to see if there are any panics.
evals.expected_output: The agent should use a zero-memory stream (grep) to filter the log instead of trying to read the whole file.
assertions: The agent uses grep to search the log
The agent does not attempt to read the entire file into memory
